series_metadata.series_description: Records contain documents used to evaluate a juvenile that has been involved in a fire incident or has been referred to the program by a parent or another entity/agency. These records would include contact information for the juvenile and the juvenile’s family and parent questionnaire.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper copy will be kept in operating area a period of one year; general statistical data shall be retrieved from file before destruction. ; Electronic: Electronic statistical data shall be maintained
